results.compiled_code:
SELECT
  id AS raw_id,

  NULLIF(event->>'instance_id','')::int AS instance_id,
  NULLIF(event->>'user_id','')::int     AS user_id,
  NULLIF(event->>'database_id','')::int AS database_id,
  NULLIF(event->>'query_id','')::bigint    AS query_id,

  NULLIF(event->>'cluster_size','')::numeric AS cluster_size,

  NULLIF(event->>'arrival_timestamp','')::timestamptz AS arrival_timestamp,

  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'compile_duration_ms','')::numeric, 0)   AS compile_duration_ms,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'queue_duration_ms','')::numeric, 0)     AS queue_duration_ms,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'execution_duration_ms','')::numeric, 0) AS execution_duration_ms,

  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'feature_fingerprint',''), 'UNKNOWN_FINGERPRINT') AS feature_fingerprint,

  NULLIF(event->>'was_aborted','')::int AS was_aborted,
  NULLIF(event->>'was_cached','')::int  AS was_cached,

  NULLIF(event->>'query_type','') AS query_type,

  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'num_permanent_tables_accessed','')::numeric, 0) AS num_permanent_tables_accessed,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'num_external_tables_accessed','')::numeric, 0)  AS num_external_tables_accessed,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'num_system_tables_accessed','')::numeric, 0)    AS num_system_tables_accessed,

  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'mbytes_scanned','')::numeric, 0) AS mbytes_scanned,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'mbytes_spilled','')::numeric, 0) AS mbytes_spilled,

  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'num_joins','')::numeric, 0)        AS num_joins,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'num_scans','')::numeric, 0)        AS num_scans,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'num_aggregations','')::numeric, 0) AS num_aggregations,

  NULLIF(btrim(event->>'read_table_ids'), '') IS NOT NULL AS has_read,
  NULLIF(btrim(event->>'write_table_ids'), '') IS NOT NULL AS has_write

FROM public.redset_events

WITH ordered AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    COUNT(cluster_size) OVER (
      PARTITION BY instance_id
      ORDER BY arrival_timestamp, raw_id
      ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS grp_fwd
  FROM "redset_db"."analytics_analytics"."raw_clean"
),

ffilled AS (
  SELECT
    o.*,
    MAX(cluster_size) OVER (
      PARTITION BY instance_id, grp_fwd
    ) AS cluster_size_ffill
  FROM ordered o
),

bfill_prep AS (
  SELECT
    f.*,
    COUNT(cluster_size_ffill) OVER (
      PARTITION BY instance_id
      ORDER BY arrival_timestamp DESC, raw_id DESC
      ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS grp_bwd
  FROM ffilled f
),

bfilled AS (
  SELECT
    b.*,
    MAX(cluster_size_ffill) OVER (
      PARTITION BY instance_id, grp_bwd
    ) AS cluster_size_bfill
  FROM bfill_prep b
),

global_median AS (
  SELECT
    percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cluster_size) AS med
  FROM "redset_db"."analytics_analytics"."raw_clean"
)

SELECT
  bfilled.*,
  COALESCE(bfilled.cluster_size_bfill, gm.med) AS cluster_size_clean
FROM bfilled
CROSS JOIN global_median gm

SELECT
  d.raw_id,

  d.instance_id,
  d.user_id,
  d.database_id,
  d.query_id,

  d.arrival_timestamp,

  (d.arrival_timestamp + (COALESCE(d.execution_duration_ms, 0) * INTERVAL '1 millisecond')) AS query_end_timestamp,

  d.compile_duration_ms,
  d.queue_duration_ms,
  d.execution_duration_ms,

  d.feature_fingerprint,

  CASE
    WHEN d.feature_fingerprint IS NULL
      OR d.feature_fingerprint = ''
      OR UPPER(d.feature_fingerprint) IN ('UNKNOWN', 'UNKNOWN_FINGERPRINT')
    THEN TRUE
    ELSE FALSE
  END AS is_unknown_fingerprint,

  d.was_aborted,
  d.was_cached,

  d.query_type,

  d.num_permanent_tables_accessed,
  d.num_external_tables_accessed,
  d.num_system_tables_accessed,

  d.mbytes_scanned,
  d.mbytes_spilled,

  d.num_joins,
  d.num_scans,
  d.num_aggregations,

  d.cluster_size_clean,

  d.has_read,
  d.has_write,

  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(d.num_external_tables_accessed, 0) > 0
      THEN 'External (Data Lake)'
    WHEN COALESCE(d.num_system_tables_accessed, 0) > 0
      THEN 'System Internal'
    WHEN COALESCE(d.num_permanent_tables_accessed, 0) > 0
      THEN 'Core Warehousing'
    ELSE 'Metadata only'
  END AS access_scope,

  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(d.num_system_tables_accessed, 0) > 0 THEN TRUE
    WHEN d.query_type IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(d.query_type) IN (
      'analyze',
      'vacuum',
      'commit',
      'rollback',
      'begin',
      'set',
      'show',
      'describe',
      'explain'
    ) THEN TRUE
    ELSE FALSE
  END AS workload_is_system_metadata,

  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(d.num_system_tables_accessed, 0) > 0
      THEN 'System/Metadata'
    WHEN d.query_type IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(d.query_type) IN (
      'analyze',
      'vacuum',
      'commit',
      'rollback',
      'begin',
      'set',
      'show',
      'describe',
      'explain'
    )
      THEN 'System/Metadata'
    WHEN COALESCE(d.has_read, FALSE) = TRUE
     AND COALESCE(d.has_write, FALSE) = TRUE
      THEN 'Read/Write'
    WHEN COALESCE(d.has_read, FALSE) = TRUE
     AND COALESCE(d.has_write, FALSE) = FALSE
      THEN 'Read only'
    WHEN COALESCE(d.has_read, FALSE) = FALSE
     AND COALESCE(d.has_write, FALSE) = TRUE
      THEN 'Write only'
    ELSE 'Unknown/Other'
  END AS workload_classification

FROM "redset_db"."analytics_analytics"."cluster_clean" d


  WHERE d.raw_id > (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(raw_id), 0) FROM "redset_db"."analytics_analytics"."clean_table")

WITH bounds AS (
  
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(window_start), TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01') AS max_window_start
    FROM "redset_db"."analytics_analytics"."kpi_leaderboard_15m"
  
),

base AS (
  SELECT
    arrival_timestamp,
    user_id,
    query_type,
    workload_classification,
    access_scope,
    feature_fingerprint,
    was_cached,
    was_aborted,
    execution_duration_ms,
    mbytes_scanned,
    mbytes_spilled,
    raw_id
  FROM "redset_db"."analytics_analytics"."clean_table"
  
    WHERE arrival_timestamp >= (SELECT max_window_start FROM bounds) - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
  
),

with_window AS (
  SELECT
    (
      DATE_TRUNC('hour', arrival_timestamp)
      + (FLOOR(EXTRACT(minute FROM arrival_timestamp)::numeric / 15) * INTERVAL '15 minutes')
    ) AS window_start,

    user_id,
    query_type,
    workload_classification,
    access_scope,
    feature_fingerprint,

    CASE
      WHEN was_cached = 1 THEN 0.05
      WHEN was_cached <> 1 AND was_aborted = 1 THEN 0.10
      ELSE
        LEAST(
          1.0,
          GREATEST(
            0.05,
            (
              0.4 * LEAST(COALESCE(execution_duration_ms, 0) / 300000.0, 1.0)
            + 0.4 * LEAST(COALESCE(mbytes_scanned, 0) / 10240.0, 1.0)
            + 0.2 * LEAST(COALESCE(mbytes_spilled, 0) / 1024.0, 1.0)
            )
          )
        )
    END AS heavy_unit
  FROM base
),

unioned AS (
  SELECT window_start, 'user' AS dimension_type, CAST(user_id AS VARCHAR) AS dimension_value, heavy_unit
  FROM with_window
  WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL
  SELECT window_start, 'query_type' AS dimension_type, COALESCE(query_type, 'UNKNOWN') AS dimension_value, heavy_unit
  FROM with_window

  UNION ALL
  SELECT window_start, 'workload' AS dimension_type, COALESCE(workload_classification, 'UNKNOWN') AS dimension_value, heavy_unit
  FROM with_window

  UNION ALL
  SELECT window_start, 'access_scope' AS dimension_type, COALESCE(access_scope, 'UNKNOWN') AS dimension_value, heavy_unit
  FROM with_window

  UNION ALL
  SELECT window_start, 'fingerprint' AS dimension_type, COALESCE(feature_fingerprint, 'UNKNOWN') AS dimension_value, heavy_unit
  FROM with_window
),

agg AS (
  SELECT
    window_start,
    window_start + INTERVAL '15 minutes' AS window_end,
    dimension_type,
    dimension_value,
    COUNT(*) AS queries_count,
    SUM(heavy_unit) AS heavy_units_sum
  FROM unioned
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
),

ranked AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY window_start, dimension_type
      ORDER BY heavy_units_sum DESC
    ) AS rank_position
  FROM agg
)

SELECT
  MD5(
    CAST(window_start AS VARCHAR)
    || '-' || dimension_type
    || '-' || dimension_value
  ) AS lb_key,

  window_start,
  window_end,
  dimension_type,
  dimension_value,
  rank_position,
  queries_count,
  heavy_units_sum
FROM ranked
WHERE rank_position <= 10

WITH base AS (

    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('minute', arrival_timestamp) AS minute_ts,
        instance_id,
        workload_classification,
        access_scope,
        query_type,
        was_cached,
        was_aborted,
        execution_duration_ms,
        queue_duration_ms,
        mbytes_scanned,
        mbytes_spilled,
        cluster_size_clean,

        raw_id
    FROM "redset_db"."analytics_analytics"."clean_table"

    
      WHERE raw_id > (
        SELECT COALESCE(MAX(source_max_raw_id), 0)
        FROM "redset_db"."analytics_analytics"."kpi_minute_cluster_workload"
      )
    
),

row_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    minute_ts,
    instance_id,
    workload_classification,
    access_scope,
    query_type,
    raw_id,

    execution_duration_ms,
    queue_duration_ms,
    mbytes_scanned,
    mbytes_spilled,
    cluster_size_clean,

    CASE
      WHEN was_cached = 1 THEN 0.05
      WHEN was_cached <> 1 AND was_aborted = 1 THEN 0.10
      ELSE
        LEAST(
          1.0,
          GREATEST(
            0.05,
            (
              0.4 * LEAST(COALESCE(execution_duration_ms, 0) / 300000.0, 1.0)
            + 0.4 * LEAST(COALESCE(mbytes_scanned, 0) / 10240.0, 1.0)
            + 0.2 * LEAST(COALESCE(mbytes_spilled, 0) / 1024.0, 1.0)
            )
          )
        )
    END AS heavy_unit
  FROM base
)

,

agg AS (
    SELECT
        minute_ts,
        instance_id,
        workload_classification,
        access_scope,
        query_type,
        COUNT(*) AS queries_count,
        SUM(heavy_unit) AS heavy_units_sum,
        SUM(COALESCE(mbytes_scanned, 0)) AS scanned_mb_sum,
        SUM(COALESCE(mbytes_spilled, 0)) AS spilled_mb_sum,
        SUM(COALESCE(execution_duration_ms, 0)) AS exec_ms_sum,
        SUM(COALESCE(queue_duration_ms, 0)) AS queue_ms_sum,
        MAX(cluster_size_clean) AS cluster_size_clean_max,
        MAX(raw_id) AS source_max_raw_id
    FROM row_metrics
    GROUP BY
        minute_ts,
        instance_id,
        workload_classification,
        access_scope,
        query_type
)

SELECT
    MD5(
      CAST(minute_ts AS VARCHAR)
      || '-' || CAST(instance_id AS VARCHAR)
      || '-' || workload_classification
      || '-' || access_scope
      || '-' || query_type
    ) AS kpi_key,

    minute_ts,
    instance_id,
    workload_classification,
    access_scope,
    query_type,

    queries_count,
    heavy_units_sum,
    scanned_mb_sum,
    spilled_mb_sum,
    exec_ms_sum,
    queue_ms_sum,
    cluster_size_clean_max,

    source_max_raw_id
FROM agg

WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('minute', arrival_timestamp) AS minute_ts,
        instance_id,

        execution_duration_ms,
        queue_duration_ms,
        mbytes_scanned,
        mbytes_spilled,

        raw_id
    FROM "redset_db"."analytics_analytics"."clean_table"

    
      WHERE raw_id > (
        SELECT COALESCE(MAX(source_max_raw_id), 0)
        FROM "redset_db"."analytics_analytics"."kpi_minute_query_efficiency"
      )
    
),

classified AS (
    SELECT
        minute_ts,
        instance_id,
        execution_duration_ms,
        queue_duration_ms,
        mbytes_scanned,
        mbytes_spilled,
        raw_id,

        CASE
          WHEN COALESCE(mbytes_scanned, 0) > 1024
           AND COALESCE(execution_duration_ms, 0) < 30000
          THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS is_scan_heavy
    FROM base
),

agg AS (
    SELECT
        minute_ts,
        instance_id,

        COUNT(*) AS total_queries,

        AVG(COALESCE(execution_duration_ms, 0)) AS avg_exec_ms,
        AVG(COALESCE(queue_duration_ms, 0)) AS avg_queue_ms,

        SUM(COALESCE(mbytes_scanned, 0)) AS scanned_mb_sum,
        SUM(COALESCE(mbytes_spilled, 0)) AS spilled_mb_sum,

        SUM(is_scan_heavy) AS scan_heavy_queries,

        MAX(raw_id) AS source_max_raw_id
    FROM classified
    GROUP BY 1, 2
)

SELECT
    MD5(
      CAST(minute_ts AS VARCHAR)
      || '-' || CAST(instance_id AS VARCHAR)
    ) AS kpi_key,

    minute_ts,
    instance_id,

    total_queries,
    avg_exec_ms,
    avg_queue_ms,

    scanned_mb_sum,
    spilled_mb_sum,

    scan_heavy_queries,
    (scan_heavy_queries::numeric / NULLIF(total_queries, 0)) AS waste_pct,

    source_max_raw_id
FROM agg

WITH bounds AS (
  
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(window_start), TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01') AS max_window_start
    FROM "redset_db"."analytics_analytics"."kpi_resource_predator_15m"
  
),

base AS (
  SELECT
    window_start,
    window_end,
    dimension_type,
    dimension_value,
    heavy_units_sum,
    queries_count
  FROM "redset_db"."analytics_analytics"."kpi_leaderboard_15m"
  WHERE dimension_type IN ('user', 'fingerprint')
  
    AND window_start >= (SELECT max_window_start FROM bounds) - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
  
),

totals AS (
  SELECT
    window_start,
    dimension_type,
    SUM(heavy_units_sum) AS total_heavy_units
  FROM base
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),

scored AS (
  SELECT
    b.window_start,
    b.window_end,
    b.dimension_type AS predator_type,
    b.dimension_value AS predator_value,
    b.queries_count,
    b.heavy_units_sum,
    t.total_heavy_units,
    (b.heavy_units_sum::numeric / NULLIF(t.total_heavy_units, 0)) AS cost_share_pct
  FROM base b
  JOIN totals t
    ON b.window_start = t.window_start
   AND b.dimension_type = t.dimension_type
),

ranked AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY window_start, predator_type
      ORDER BY cost_share_pct DESC, heavy_units_sum DESC
    ) AS rank_position
  FROM scored
)

SELECT
  MD5(CAST(window_start AS VARCHAR) || '-' || predator_type || '-' || predator_value) AS pred_key,
  window_start,
  window_end,
  predator_type,
  predator_value,
  rank_position,
  queries_count,
  heavy_units_sum,
  total_heavy_units,
  cost_share_pct
FROM ranked
WHERE rank_position <= 20

WITH bounds AS (
  
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(minute_ts), TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01') AS max_minute_ts
    FROM "redset_db"."analytics_analytics"."kpi_minute_concurrency_cluster"
  
),

base AS (
  SELECT
    raw_id,
    instance_id,
    DATE_TRUNC('minute', arrival_timestamp) AS start_minute,
    DATE_TRUNC('minute', query_end_timestamp) AS end_minute
  FROM "redset_db"."analytics_analytics"."clean_table"
  
    WHERE DATE_TRUNC('minute', arrival_timestamp) >= (SELECT max_minute_ts FROM bounds) - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
  
),

expanded AS (
  SELECT
    b.instance_id,
    gs.minute_ts,
    b.raw_id,
    b.start_minute,
    b.end_minute
  FROM base b
  JOIN LATERAL generate_series(b.start_minute, b.end_minute, INTERVAL '1 minute') AS gs(minute_ts)
    ON TRUE
),

agg AS (
  SELECT
    minute_ts,
    instance_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT raw_id) AS active_queries,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN start_minute = minute_ts THEN raw_id END) AS started_queries,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN end_minute = minute_ts THEN raw_id END) AS ended_queries
  FROM expanded
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),

cluster_size AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('minute', arrival_timestamp) AS minute_ts,
    instance_id,
    MAX(COALESCE(cluster_size_clean, 0)) AS cluster_size_clean_max
  FROM "redset_db"."analytics_analytics"."clean_table"
  
    WHERE DATE_TRUNC('minute', arrival_timestamp) >= (SELECT max_minute_ts FROM bounds) - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
  
  GROUP BY 1, 2
)

SELECT
  MD5(CAST(a.minute_ts AS VARCHAR) || '-' || CAST(a.instance_id AS VARCHAR)) AS kpi_key,
  a.minute_ts,
  a.instance_id,
  a.active_queries,
  a.started_queries,
  a.ended_queries,
  cs.cluster_size_clean_max,
  (a.active_queries::numeric / NULLIF(cs.cluster_size_clean_max, 0)) AS query_pressure
FROM agg a
LEFT JOIN cluster_size cs
  ON a.minute_ts = cs.minute_ts
 AND a.instance_id = cs.instance_id

WITH bounds AS (

  
  SELECT COALESCE(MAX(minute_ts), TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01') AS max_minute_ts
  FROM "redset_db"."analytics_analytics"."kpi_offpeak_flags_minute"
  

),

pressure AS (
  SELECT
    minute_ts,
    instance_id,
    query_pressure,
    active_queries
  FROM "redset_db"."analytics_analytics"."kpi_minute_concurrency_cluster"
  
    WHERE minute_ts >= (SELECT max_minute_ts FROM bounds) - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
  
),

cost AS (
  SELECT
    minute_ts,
    instance_id,
    SUM(heavy_units_sum) AS heavy_units_total
  FROM "redset_db"."analytics_analytics"."kpi_minute_cluster_workload"
  
    WHERE minute_ts >= (SELECT max_minute_ts FROM bounds) - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
  
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),

joined AS (
  SELECT
    p.minute_ts,
    p.instance_id,
    p.query_pressure,
    p.active_queries,
    COALESCE(c.heavy_units_total, 0) AS heavy_units_total
  FROM pressure p
  LEFT JOIN cost c
    ON p.minute_ts = c.minute_ts
   AND p.instance_id = c.instance_id
),

scored AS (
  SELECT
    j.*,
    CASE WHEN j.query_pressure <= 0.30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_low_pressure,
    CASE WHEN j.heavy_units_total <= 5.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_low_cost,
    CASE
      WHEN j.query_pressure <= 0.30 AND j.heavy_units_total <= 5.0 THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS is_offpeak_recommended
  FROM joined j
)

SELECT
  MD5(CAST(s.minute_ts AS VARCHAR) || '-' || CAST(s.instance_id AS VARCHAR)) AS flag_key,
  s.minute_ts,
  s.instance_id,
  s.query_pressure,
  s.active_queries,
  s.heavy_units_total,
  s.is_low_pressure,
  s.is_low_cost,
  s.is_offpeak_recommended
FROM scored s

WHERE s.minute_ts >= (SELECT max_minute_ts FROM bounds) - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
